

Allen, J.M., Germain-Aubrey, C.C., Barve, N., Neubig, K.M., Majure,
L.C., Laffan, S.W., Mishler, B.D., Owens, H.L., Smith, S.A., Whitten,
W.M., Abbott, J.R., Soltis, D.E., Guralnick, R. & Soltis, P.S. (2019)
[Spatial phylogenetics of florida vascular plants: The effects of
calibration and uncertainty on diversity
estimates](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.isci.2018.12.002). *iScience*,
**11**, 57--70.

Azevedo, J.A.R., Guedes, T.B., Nogueira, C. de C., Passos, P., Sawaya,
R.J., Prudente, A.L.C., Barbo, F.E., Strüssmann, C., Franco, F.L.,
Arzamendia, V., Giraudo, A.R., Argôlo, A.J.S., Jansen, M., Zaher, H.,
Tonini, J.F.R., Faurby, S. & Antonelli, A. (2019) [Museums and cradles
of diversity are geographically coincident for narrowly distributed
neotropical snakes](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.04815). *Ecography*,
**43**, 328--339.

Dagallier, L.M.J., Janssens, S.B., Dauby, G., Blach‐Overgaard, A.,
Mackinder, B.A., Droissart, V., Svenning, J., Sosef, M.S.M., Stévart,
T., Harris, D.J., Sonké, B., Wieringa, J.J., Hardy, O.J. & Couvreur,
T.L.P. (2019) [Cradles and museums of generic plant diversity across
tropical africa](https://doi.org/10.1111/nph.16293). *New Phytologist*,
**225**, 2196--2213.

Daru, B.H., Roux, P.C. le, Gopalraj, J., Park, D.S., Holt, B.G. & Greve,
M. (2019) [Spatial overlaps between the global protected areas network
and terrestrial hotspots of evolutionary
diversity](https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.12888). *Global Ecology and
Biogeography*, **28**, 757--766.

Fuentes‐Castillo, T., Scherson, R.A., Marquet, P.A., Fajardo, J.,
Corcoran, D., Román, M.J. & Pliscoff, P. (2019) [Modelling the current
and future biodiversity distribution in the chilean mediterranean
hotspot. The role of protected areas network in a warmer
future](https://doi.org/10.1111/ddi.12988). *Diversity and
Distributions*, **25**, 1897--1909.

Gallien, L., Thornhill, A.H., Zurell, D., Miller, J.T. & Richardson,
D.M. (2019) [Global predictors of alien plant establishment success:
Combining niche and trait
proxies](https://doi.org/10.1098/rspb.2018.2477). *Proceedings of the
Royal Society B: Biological Sciences*, **286**, 20182477.

Greenlon, A., Chang, P.L., Damtew, Z.M., Muleta, A.,
Carrasquilla-Garcia, N., Kim, D., Nguyen, H.P., Suryawanshi, V., Krieg,
C.P., Yadav, S.K., Patel, J.S., Mukherjee, A., Udupa, S., Benjelloun,
I., Thami-Alami, I., Yasin, M., Patil, B., Singh, S., Sarma, B.K.,
Wettberg, E.J.B. von, Kahraman, A., Bukun, B., Assefa, F., Tesfaye, K.,
Fikre, A. & Cook, D.R. (2019) [Global-level population genomics reveals
differential effects of geography and phylogeny on horizontal gene
transfer in soil bacteria](https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.1900056116).
*Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences*, **116**,
15200--15209.

Lam-Gordillo, O. & Ardisson, P.-L. (2019) [The global distribution and
richness of frog crabs
(raninoidea)](https://doi.org/10.1163/15685403-00003832). *Crustaceana*,
**92**, 1--31.

López‐Aguirre, C., Hand, S.J., Laffan, S.W. & Archer, M. (2019)
[Zoogeographical regions and geospatial patterns of phylogenetic
diversity and endemism of new world
bats](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.04194). *Ecography*, **42**,
1188--1199.

McDonald‐Spicer, C., Knerr, N.J., Encinas‐Viso, F. & Schmidt‐Lebuhn,
A.N. (2019) [Big data for a large clade: Bioregionalization and
ancestral range estimation in the daisy family
(asteraceae)](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.13496). *Journal of
Biogeography*, **46**, 255--267.

Mienna, I.M., Speed, J.D.M., Bendiksby, M., Thornhill, A.H., Mishler,
B.D. & Martin, M.D. (2019) [Differential patterns of floristic
phylogenetic diversity across a post‐glacial
landscape](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.13789). *Journal of
Biogeography*, **47**, 915--926.

Ruiz-Sanchez, E., Munguía-Lino, G., Vargas-Amado, G. & Rodríguez, A.
(2019) [Diversity, endemism and conservation status of native mexican
woody bamboos (poaceae: Bambusoideae:
bambuseae)](https://doi.org/10.1093/botlinnean/boz062). *Botanical
Journal of the Linnean Society*.

Shelley, J.J., Dempster, T., Le Feuvre, M.C., Unmack, P.J., Laffan, S.W.
& Swearer, S.E. (2019) [A revision of the bioregionalisation of
freshwater fish communities in the australian monsoonal
tropics](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.5059). *Ecology and Evolution*,
**9**, 4568--4588.

Sundaram, M., Donoghue, M.J., Farjon, A., Filer, D., Mathews, S., Jetz,
W. & Leslie, A.B. (2019) [Accumulation over evolutionary time as a major
cause of biodiversity hotspots in
conifers](https://doi.org/10.1098/rspb.2019.1887). *Proceedings of the
Royal Society B: Biological Sciences*, **286**, 20191887.

Xuerui, D., Hong, Z. & Minggang, Z. (2019) [Explaining the diversity and
endemic patterns based on phylogenetic approach for woody plants of the
loess plateau](https://doi.org/10.17520/biods.2019224). *Biodiversity
Science*, **27**, 1269--1278.
